{'reasoning': "I need to construct a SPIR-V fragment shader that implements Phong specular highlights. The shader will:\n\n1. Read inputs: worldPos (location 0), normal (location 1)\n2. Read UBO: lightPos (offset 192), cameraPos (offset 208)\n3. Compute N = normalize(normal)\n4. Compute L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - worldPos)\n5. Compute V = normalize(cameraPos.xyz - worldPos)\n6. Compute R = reflect(-L, N)\n7. Compute diffuse = max(dot(N, L), 0)\n8. Compute specular = pow(max(dot(R, V), 0), 32)\n9. Compute intensity = 0.2 + 0.5*diffuse + 0.8*specular\n10. Output vec4(intensity, intensity, intensity, 1.0)\n\nI'll need these IDs:\n- Types: void, float, vec3, vec4, function types, pointer types\n- UBO struct and pointer\n- Input/output variables\n-
